name: Absolute tile index on A/B operand
description: mul_tiles(A, B, abs_i, abs_j, dst) where indices aren't 0-based sequential; helpers only support sequential or compile-time-stride.
fix_approach: Add cb_tile_idx parameter on B side of binary_op (like DestReuseOp already has). For A side: expose absolute tile index as a separate template or runtime field.

name: Cumulative wait policy
description: cb_wait_front(CB, base + iter * step) — count grows each chunk iteration; no BinaryInputPolicy value waits cumulatively.
fix_approach: Add BinaryInputPolicy::WaitCumulative — wait for base + iter * step tiles, pop at end. Requires the helper to track an internal running wait count.

name: EltwiseBinaryType to BinaryOpType mapping
description: BCAST_LLKOP is a preprocessor macro set to EltwiseBinaryType::ELWMUL, but binary_op requires BinaryOpType::MUL; no automatic mapping exists between different enum types from different layers.
fix_approach: Add a constexpr BinaryOpType from_eltwise_type(EltwiseBinaryType) mapping helper, OR add a binary_op_with_bcast_macro<BCAST_LLKOP, BCAST_DIM>(...) variant that accepts EltwiseBinaryType directly.

name: Multi-DST SFPU ops (3+ DST-slot arguments)
description: logsigmoid_tile(dst0, dst1, dst_out) and similar ops operate on 3 separate DEST slots; sfpu_chain BinaryOp base handles 2-slot, but these have a different API that doesn't match CRTP base signature.
fix_approach: Add dedicated Logsigmoid<DataSlot, AuxSlot> and Logit chain elements wrapping the 3-arg LLK calls directly (can't use BinaryOp CRTP base).

name: Non-sequential output pack
description: pack_tile(i, cb_out, wt + i) — packs to an absolute output tile index, not 0-based; helper output is always sequential from 0.
fix_approach: New BinaryOutputPolicy::BulkAbsolute that accepts a base-offset, or a caller-supplied output tile index per pack.

name: copy_dest_values — copy one DEST slot to another
description: copy_dest_values(src_slot, dst_slot) moves a DST register value to another slot in-place; no chain element wraps this; needed in gelu_backward to save tanh result before squaring it.
fix_approach: Add CopyDest<SrcSlot, DstSlot> element (10 lines). Wraps copy_dest_values(src, dst).

name: Asymmetric wait/process/pop
description: Compute pops tile_granularity tiles per iteration even when only M < tile_granularity are processed; helper symmetric contract: wait(shape) == process(shape) == pop(shape).
fix_approach: New BinaryInputPolicy::WaitAndPopPadded — wait N, process min(M, N), pop N. Requires passing N (the pad stride) separately from shape's Wt (the process count).

name: Self-feeding accumulator
description: Output is packed to cb_acc, then cb_wait_front(cb_acc,1)+copy_tile+pack_tile(cb_out) inside the SAME acquire window; operand B switches between cb_start and cb_acc via runtime conditional.
fix_approach: Requires a new accumulator reload output model — helper packs result, then immediately re-reads it for the next iteration; generalize BinaryAccumulate for output-then-reload-as-B pattern.

name: Indexed Load (tile i from a pre-waited block)
description: sfpu_pipeline always uses Load::cb_tile_idx = 0; when caller pre-waits N tiles and wants to access tiles 0..N-1 across a batched acquire window, cb_tile_idx stays at 0 for every call.
fix_approach: LoadPolicy::WaitUpfrontPopAtEnd on sfpu_chain Load elements. Pipeline issues bulk cb_wait_front(CB, N) before the tile loop and bulk cb_pop_front(CB, N) after; Load::exec self-advances cb_tile_idx_. Compile-time duplicate-CB check prevents double-pop. DestReuseOp also supports the same policy. Consumers: tanh_bw, gelu_poly.

name: In-place output with CB capacity=1 (pop-before-reserve ordering)
description: Raw code: cb_pop_front(A,1); cb_reserve_back(A,1) — pops input before reserving output on the SAME CB with capacity 1; helper always reserves before pops causing deadlock.
fix_approach: Either increase CB capacity to 2 in the program factory (program_factory change, not helper), or add BinaryOutputPolicy::InplacePopFirst that pops input before reserving output.

name: Mid-chain reinit after DestReuseOp followed by Load in same iteration
description: chain_has_non_load_fpu_clash_v triggers copy_tile_to_dst_init_short reinit at the START of each sfpu_pipeline iteration, but if DestReuseOp clobbers MOP state and a Load follows within the SAME chain.apply(), the Load runs under wrong state.
fix_approach: In SfpuChain::apply(), detect when a non-Load FPU-clashing element precedes a Load element and call copy_tile_to_dst_init_short(CB) inline between them.

name: L1 accumulation pack
description: pack_tile<true>(i, cb, 0) + llk_pack_reconfig_l1_acc(1) — repeatedly packs to the same output tile slot, accumulating in L1 (not replacing); helper packs are always sequential writes.
fix_approach: New BinaryOutputPolicy::L1Accumulate — calls llk_pack_reconfig_l1_acc(1) before pack and packs to the same slot repeatedly.

name: Runtime constant fill_tile in chain
description: FillScalar stores a runtime float value field; FillConst handles compile-time constants via fill_tile_bitcast; both in sfpu_math.hpp.
fix_approach: FillScalar<Dst> and FillConst<Bits, Dst> added to sfpu_math.hpp.

name: Missing TanhDerivative sfpu_chain element
description: TanhDerivative<Approx, Dst> added to sfpu_math.hpp, wrapping tanh_derivative_tile_init<fast>() and tanh_derivative_tile<fast>(d0).
